headline: US FTC in settlement talks with ad companies in boycott probe, WSJ reports

raw.headline: US FTC in settlement talks with ad companies in boycott probe, WSJ reports

headline: FTC in Settlement Talks With Ad Companies in Boycott Probe
summary: The government began an inquiry last year into whether ad firms were funneling client dollars away from certain media platforms.
